g.title: pwiz_module_detail
g.text: one node per .cpp/.hpp pair (test fixtures omitted); each group is its own row, top-to-bottom

a.xlink:title: IdentData-specific diff specialization. Ported as IdentData/Diff.cs.
Top-level mzIdentML container model. Ported as IdentData/IdentData.cs + per-element classes (Mzid/*).
Reader dispatcher (mzid / pepXML). Ported as IdentData/DefaultReaderList.cs.
IDREF resolver for the IdentData graph. Ported as IdentData/References.cs.
Mascot .dat parser. NOT PORTED — niche; users go via pepXML.
TSV / CSV import (PeptideShaker, MSGF+ outputs). NOT PORTED — re-port when a consumer asks.
IReader interface for IdentData files. Ported as IdentData/Reader.cs.
mzIdentML element-by-element parser. Ported as IdentData/Mzid/MzidReader.cs + MzidWriter.cs.
Pretty-print text dump of IdentData. NOT PORTED.
protXML protein-inference format. NOT PORTED — narrow user base.
Pretty-print walker used by Serializer_Text. NOT PORTED.
Keyword → CVID heuristic table. NOT PORTED.
LINQ-style predicates over an IdentData graph. NOT PORTED.
pepXML → mzIdentML one-shot converter. NOT PORTED.
Won't port. No specific replacement recorded.
